title: A round orange UFO spotted twice near an aerodrome airstrip in Cascavel [2014]

text_preview:
DEC 4th, 2014. At 03h00am, an aeronautical station operator at the Cascavel Aerodrome, Paraná, reported two sightings of the same round UFO of strong and intense orange color with approximately 30 cm in size, in the interval of ten minutes, traveling towards the aerodrome after making a left turn. The object moved in an East / West direction, with an approximate speed of 180km / h and 10 NM from Cascavel.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.725. “Questionário so
summary: Aeronautical station operator at Cascavel Aerodrome sighted a round orange UFO twice in ten minutes approaching from the east at ~180 km/h.
